compiled_state.title: Stale RED marker detector blocks when only SOME RED-zone tests pass — should only trigger when ALL pass
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 2 (BASIC). Stale RED marker detection logic triggers on partial passes instead of all-pass.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fix: removed incorrect stale RED marker detection block from the exit_code!=0 branch in record-test-status.sh. When all failures are in the RED zone but some RED-zone tests pass (partial progress), the marker is NOT stale — tolerate failures. True stale detection (all tests pass) is handled by the exit_code==0 branch.
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
